title: Tracing the Roots
observed_public_files: OpenReview supplement ZIP; four CIFAR10 diffusion-trajectory feature tensors; verified tensor hashes; replayed AUC 0.815826, accuracy 0.7375, TPR@1%FPR 0.134, TPR@0.1%FPR 0.038
consumer_question: Can this public feature-packet-only evidence serve as a provenance-limited E2 false-promotion review row without being counted as N50 denominator evidence?
first_blocker: raw target checkpoint identity and raw sample IDs are absent
notes: Yes for false-promotion utility: the public packet is independently identifiable and binds train/eval member/external feature tensors to replayed metrics, so it is useful as a bounded-support review row that demonstrates strong metrics with partial target/provenance gates. It must not be promoted to admitted, N50 denominator, black-box response, or raw provenance evidence.
